message:
fix: strip BD_BRANCH for MR bead creation and source issue lookups in gt done

MR bead creation and source issue reads were targeting the polecats Dolt
branch instead of main. Source issues created by the mayor live on main,
causing issue not found errors. MR beads must be visible on main
immediately for the refinery to pick them up.

Adds onMainBranch() helper that temporarily clears BD_BRANCH and returns
a restore function. Applied to five call sites in the done flow:
- Source issue lookup for no_merge check
- Integration branch detection
- Priority inheritance from source issue
- Existing MR idempotency check
- MR bead creation

Branch isolation is preserved for all other polecat writes (agent bead
updates, checkpoints, done-intent labels).

Closes: gt-9grfm8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
